comment: Build/loadout page (the `full = {...}` SvelteKit var). Separate page from the snapshot - it carries avatar/skin items the snapshot lacks. root = the loadouts array; loadouts[0] is the active build. NOTE: urlTemplate is the support's loadout page; {hash} is the entity loadoutHash. It is left EMPTY by default because the exact lostark.bible loadout URL is unverified - set it to enable loadout fetching (candidate: https://lostark.bible/character/loadout/{hash}). While empty, the worker skips the loadout fetch and these fields are simply not produced (their cells stay blank).

intermediates.comment: Set of legendary skin item ids, bundled from data/legendary_skin_ids.json

fields.comment: Auto-detected legendary-skin count (0-4) across the 4 main avatar slots. Superseded by the manual `skinBonus` advanced input (-> F18); kept (unbound) for when loadout fetching is enabled. Renamed from skinBonus to avoid colliding with that input-driven snapshot field.
